comparables.note: Direct payments peer post-Worldpay sale — GPN trades at deep discount but for cause (deal leverage)
Higher-quality payments comp — GPN's 4.66x fwd implies Street disbelief in deal accretion

growth_picks.analyst_take: GPN's headline 4.66x forward P/E looks tantalizing but masks GAAP losses, 2.94% ROE, and a transformative Worldpay deal with $23.6B of debt in the capital structure. The framework score of 3.5 with a hard fail on capital efficiency and missing earnings_growth makes this a 'show me' story — better to wait for actual integration milestones than to underwrite Street's $16.20 forward EPS on hope.
